## 🏛️ Civic Reception — Glasgow City Chambers

Hosted at the historic **Glasgow City Chambers**, George Square G2 1DU.

**Getting there:** Short walk from Buchanan Street and Queen Street stations.\
*Dress code guidance will be sent to registered participants closer to the event.*
:::
